subject: Re: Fw: Little St. James
body:
I understand, However, next time , please give me more
notice of a delay, than the day before it is due.. I
had planned to go to the island to walk the proposal..
,, Also I think it might be helpful, if you ouline
your proposal on the large photo I am sending.. LEt's
shoot for the 18, as it appears you will have only one
day back otherwise,

body_html:
I understand, However, next time , please give me more
notice of a delay, than the day before it is due.. I
had planned to go to the island to walk the proposal..
,, Also I think it might be helpful, if you ouline
your proposal on the large photo I am sending.. LEt's
shoot for the 18, as it appears you will have only one
day back otherwise,
--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Abe Nielsen ANielsen@edsaplan.com
Sent: Sep 7, 2006 12:48 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: Bob Behling rbehling@edsaplan.com, Mindy
Hertzon MHertzon@edsaplan.com
Subject: Little St. James

Sara,

Please forward the following to Mr. Epstein. Thank
you.

Mr. Epstein,

I apologize for the delay in getting you the layout
plan of the roads
and trail systems for Little St. James. I am
traveling on business
today (September 7th) through next Thursday
(September 14th), so I
unfortunately won't have a chance to complete the
drawing by tomorrow as
promised. We won't be able to send you the
finished plan until next
Friday, September 15th. The majority of the plan
is laid out, I just
wanted to make sure that it is graphically
presented in a way that can
be easily understood and clearly and accurately
shows the different
loops of the trail system that we agreed upon
during our last visit to
the island.

Again I apologize for the delay, but in the end it
will hopefully be a
more meaningful plan rather than trying to rush
something out to you
today before I leave. Also included with the plan
will be character
images of different types of paving that we have in
mind for the various
trails, as promised. I will have my cell phone
with me, as well as
access to email should you have any questions or
concerns (see contact
info. below).

Regards,

ABRAM J. NIELSEN

1512 E. BROWARD BOULEVARD, SUITE 110, FORT
LAUDERDALE, FLORIDA 33301 USA

TEL: 954.524.3330 FAX: 954.524.0177
